visual_description: In a dimly lit interior, a man in a black leather jacket stands with his back to the camera while a woman in a blue patterned shirt works at a counter and two men stand near a doorway. The scene cuts to an older man with gray hair in a gray suit who looks to his side and then forward, gesturing with his hand near his chest. A close‑up shows a silver Motorola flip phone displaying the number 454870 on its screen.
